xiuropaspalas-argiro.name: Xiuropaspalas
instructions: Choose pork with fat (wine pan) and cut it into bites.
Place it in a small pot without added oil and leave it on medium heat to drink all its liquids.
When dried, add the wine and let the pot dry completely again.
Fill in hot water as much as cover the pork and let it boil until it melts in the mouth for about an hour. To the end, add salt and pepper.
Heat in a pot and heat the olive oil on medium heat and bake the flour continuously stirring with a wooden spoon or wire until golden.
Lower the volume completely and gradually add warm broth from the pork to the roasted flour, stirring with the wire to dissolve.
Continue stirring until the mixture thickens and becomes a thin cream.
Finally we throw the meat in.
Try and correct salt and pepper.
Serve with some fried onion and fresh oregano.
